title: rubus clausentinus
intro: Rubus clausentinus, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry, is a species of wild raspberry native to the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus clausentinus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and support cardiovascular health. It can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs.
